title: Preimage Size of Factorial Zeroes Function
hints: Notice that f(x) is a non-decreasing function. Consider using binary search to find an x where f(x) equals K.
Since f(x) counts factors of 5 in x!, recall the formula: f(x) = x/5 + x/25 + x/125 + ... Use this to evaluate f(x) efficiently.
If you find any x such that f(x) == K, the answer is 5 because f(x) stays constant for 5 consecutive integers. Otherwise, the answer is 0.
